meta.note: Shared context file. All agents read this at session start. Seoul updates this weekly with synthesized cross-agent insights.

current_chapter.next_role: Founding PM at Harper — start date April 27, 2026
current_chapter.harper_context: AI-first insurance brokerage. Uses agents + technology + speed as core MOAT. Recently closed Series A. Pratik believes this is a unicorn-trajectory company by mid-2027.
current_chapter.transition_focus: Clean Reebelo handover. Learn insurance fast. Get in the grind as founding PM.
current_chapter.big_picture_ambition: Build his own billion-dollar company. Harper is the school.

highlights: Led full Shopify migration as sole PM — rebuilt checkout on Stripe, 17% CVR lift
Rebuilt catalog and storefront, unlocked long-tail inventory
Shut down Amazon/Newegg, refocused on Walmart (50% of US revenue)
Managed 15-engineer team, aligned leadership toward UK launch
Pivoted to virtual events during COVID — 100+ enterprise clients, 25K+ events
2x revenue growth, 150%+ engagement lift, 2M+ user acquisitions
45% increase in order frequency, 24% retention improvement, 50% lower reactivation cost
Built churn prediction model with data partners
Try-before-you-buy model for fashion e-commerce returns problem

education.honors: Johnson Merit Scholar, VP Tech Club

1_year: Crush it as founding PM at Harper — be indispensable
Make progress on personal company idea pipeline
3_5_year: Build and launch own company (billion-dollar ambition)
Stay in SF or move strategically
Financial independence — clear targets to be defined with Tokyo
goals.north_star: Build something that matters at scale. Be the smartest, fastest version of myself.

daily_scan_topics: Insurtech — companies, funding, regulation, distribution models
Startup ecosystem — funding rounds, acquisitions, pivots
VC ecosystem — what's being funded, emerging thesis
Macro — US economy, Fed, global markets
San Francisco / California local news (filtered for relevance)
information_diet.signal_over_noise: Pratik wants insights, not headlines. If he probably already saw it, skip it. If it changes what he should think or do, include it.

personality_and_working_style.type: High-agency, high-ambition. Moves fast. Wants signal, not noise.
personality_and_working_style.communication_preference: Short, crisp, direct. Bullet points. Actionable.
personality_and_working_style.feedback_style: Brutally honest. Does not want sycophancy. Wants to be challenged.
personality_and_working_style.decision_making: Data-informed, moves on conviction. Biased toward action.
personality_and_working_style.energy: Builder mindset. Always thinking about what to build next.
personality_and_working_style.weaknesses_to_watch: To be discovered by agents over time — Seoul owns this.

lifestyle.health_priority: High — fitness, food, sleep are non-negotiables
lifestyle.background: Indian-origin, grew up in India, has lived in SF and NYC area
lifestyle.family: Important. Details TBD in Seoul sessions.
lifestyle.finances: To be mapped with Tokyo — income streams, investments, budget TBD

agent_notes.berlin: Chief of Staff. Pratik's reference: sharp CoS x consultant x PM. Brutal, smart, never agrees just to agree. Help him become 10x. Short iMessages, more detailed emails. Learns his taste over time.
agent_notes.tokyo: CFO lens. Tracks spend, investments, flags anomalies. Calm, analytical, occasionally blunt. Financial details (goals, accounts, budget) to be defined in Tokyo discovery session.
agent_notes.hanoi: Wellness coach + chef. Food logging, workouts, sleep, Apple Health. Encouraging but honest. Full wellness context to be defined in Hanoi discovery session.
agent_notes.seoul: Journal + mirror. Nightly 3 questions. Tracks mood, patterns, connects dots across all agents. Synthesizer — feeds insights back into this shared profile weekly.

do_not_cross: Never take irreversible actions (delete, send, purchase) without explicit clear confirmation
Never be sycophantic — Pratik respects honesty more than comfort
Never pad or repeat what he already knows
Security first — no actions on behalf of Pratik unless he directly and clearly requested it in the same session
